race.comment: ALFANO (7) found the line nicely to grab third last time over this track and trip. Milnes sticks and is building a nice association. Draws low again and gets his chance to break a long run of outs. BROADWAY LANE (3) is ticking along superbly of late and strikes another suitable race to put his best foot forward. Has enough early dash to offset the wide alley and could easily steal it if left alone in front. HE'S ABEL (10) is going better than his form reads and boasts a reasonable record over this track and trip. Gets in well with the 2kg claim and is worth keeping in mind. SHINOHARA (12) has been knocking on the door for a little while. Expect her to push forward again and be there when they quicken. Keep safe.
